# Casa Cavour

> Design holiday apartment in the historic centre of Bertinoro, a medieval
> hilltop village in Emilia-Romagna known as the "Balcony of Romagna" for
> its panoramic views over the Po Valley and Adriatic coast. Short-term
> rentals for couples and travellers exploring Romagna. 15 min from Cesena,
> 20 min from Forlì, 40 min from Rimini, 35 min from San Marino.

## Stay

- [Italian homepage](https://www.casa-cavour.com/): Appartamento vacanze Bertinoro, affitti brevi Romagna
- [English homepage](https://en.casa-cavour.com/): Holiday apartment Bertinoro, short rentals Romagna Hills
- [Dutch homepage](https://nl.casa-cavour.com/): Vakantieappartement Bertinoro, kortetermijnverhuur Romagna

## Key facts

- Location: Via Camillo Benso di Cavour 44, Bertinoro, FC 47032, Emilia-Romagna, Italy
- Property type: Design apartment, self-catering
- Ideal for: Couples, romantic weekends, cultural tourism, food and wine tourism
- Nearby: Cesena (15 min), Forlì (20 min), San Marino (35 min), Rimini (40 min)
- Languages: Italian, English, Dutch
- Instagram: @bnb_bertinoro
